data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances user security with additional verification steps during login.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures the privacy of messages and user data through encryption protocols.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption, RSA keys for data protection.

data.title: Automated Threat Detection
data.description: Monitors and mitigates suspicious activities through real-time analysis.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for threat analysis, integration with SIEM systems.

data.title: Secure Development Lifecycle
data.description: Incorporates security practices at each phase of software development.
data.technical_spec: Static code analysis tools, OWASP guidelines.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security assessments and vulnerability testing.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing tools, vulnerability scanners like Nessus.
